# Create Feature Prompt

Add a fullstack feature for this app.

Describe the feature goal, user workflow, required data, API endpoints, frontend route or component, and acceptance criteria. Follow the repo conventions in `AGENTS.md`. Use async FastAPI, SQLAlchemy 2.0, Alembic migrations when schema changes, React functional components, TanStack Query, and shadcn-style UI.

Return the changed files, commands run, and any remaining risks.
